blocks.text: TORM ANNUAL REPORT 2019 CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS 121

These loans were issued as part of sale and leaseback transactions for two MR vessels. Further details are provided in note 23. The loans mature in 2026 and have an interest rate applicable, fixed at 1% per annum. NOTE 6 – TANGIBLE FIXED ASSETS
Transferred to assets held for sale -130.1 -54.6 -59.6
Transferred to assets held for sale -47.9 -20.4 -14.5
Impairment losses on tangible fixed assets 6.0 3.2 3.6
Transferred to assets held for sale -19.3 -8.4 -9.9

¹ ⁾ For additional information regarding impairment considerations, please refer to note 8. Included in the carrying amount for "Vessels and capitalized dry-docking" are capitalized dry- docking costs in the amount of USD 60.7m (2018: USD 67.5m, 2017: USD 68.1m). The sale and leaseback transactions in 2019 were all classified as financing arrangements and did not result in derecognition of the underlying assets as control was retained by the Group.
